title: lupinus bakeri subsp. amplus
intro: Lupinus bakeri subsp. amplus, also known as Baker's lupine or Amplus lupine, is a perennial flowering plant species belonging to the lupine family (Fabaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its alkaloid content, which has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Lupinus bakeri subsp. amplus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Lupinus bakeri subsp. amplus can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil for topical application, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in humans.
